title: Changelog, package, and release smoke hygiene
objective: Formalize changelog handling and validate actual npm package installation behavior.
description: Updates release/package smoke gates so new docs/schema/scripts are included or excluded intentionally and installed CLI behavior is verified.
parallel_safe_reason: Release/package hygiene must include outputs from schema and docs generation slices.
must: Install tarball in a temp project and execute installed CLI.
Update package safety for new public/repo-only files.
Keep npm publish automation out of scope unless prerequisites are explicit.
acceptance: Package smoke fails for forbidden local artifacts.
Package smoke fails if required public files are missing.
Installed tarball smoke runs --version, --help, and a safe dry-run command.
Changelog process is documented and coherent.
validation_hints: Explicitly reject audit files, PDFs, tests, worktrees, secrets, .DS_Store, and tool state from the package.
